sections.problem: An e-commerce-style product needed 'customers who viewed X also viewed' and a personalized homepage. We had only implicit feedback (views, clicks), no ratings.
sections.data: Synthetic user-item interaction matrix: 2k users, 500 items, ~80k events. I treated events as positive signals and used a weighted matrix (e.g. clicks weighted higher than views). No explicit negatives; I sampled negatives for training.
sections.approach: I implemented matrix factorization (ALS) and evaluated with hit rate at K and NDCG. I compared with a simple item-based collaborative filter (cosine on item vectors). Cold start was handled with a popularity fallback.
sections.results: ALS with 64 factors gave HR@10 0.42 and NDCG@10 0.28. Item-based CF was slightly worse. The chart shows HR@K for K=5,10,20.
next: Add content features (item embeddings) for cold start.
